_comment: Mid-call state for the causal subgraph. Simulates entry after analyze has already built scopes and scope_timelines. The fan-out workers (evaluate_investment_rubric, investigate_link, investigate_science_assumption, project_scope_decisions) will run from this.

scopes.label: Scale insecticide-treated bednet distribution in sub-Saharan Africa

causal_claims.claim: Scaling LLIN distribution reduces under-5 all-cause mortality by 18-25% in high-burden SSA settings
causal_claims.causal_link: LLIN → fewer malaria infections → lower child mortality

science_assumptions.question: Is pyrethroid resistance undermining LLIN efficacy in the target geographies?
science_assumptions.rationale: Widespread kdr mutations in Anopheles across West Africa may reduce bednet effectiveness

scopes.label: Seasonal malaria chemoprevention scale-up in Sahel

causal_claims.claim: SMC with SP+AQ provides 75% protective efficacy against malaria in children under 5 during the transmission season
causal_claims.causal_link: SMC → chemoprophylaxis → prevention of malaria episodes

science_assumptions.question: Is SP+AQ resistance emerging at rates that threaten long-term SMC effectiveness?
science_assumptions.rationale: Molecular markers of resistance (dhps/dhfr mutations) are increasing in Sahel countries
